title: Apple Slicer, Apple Corer, All-Metal Construction Apple Slicer and Corer with 12 Stainless Steel Blades, Large Apple Cutter for Up to 4 Inches Apples with Comfortable Wider Non-Slip Handle
features: 🍎【All-metal Apple Slicer, Not Easily Damaged】Heavy-duty all-metal apple slicer and corer consists of a zinc alloy frame and 304 stainless steel sharp blades. Thickened zinc alloy frame is more difficult to damage. 304 food grade stainless steel blade, sharp and corrosion resistant. And the blade joints are reinforced with welding for a tighter and stronger connection. It is more durable and safe compared to other apple corer and slicer with plastic handles

🍎【2-1N-1 12 Slices Apple Cutter, Slicer Also Corer】The 12-blade apple cutter slicer features a 2 and 1 design that is a slicer as well as a corer. Core and slice apples into an even 12 thin slices in just one motion. No more worrying about cutting and coring apples. And thinly sliced apples are better for kids or as a snack

🍎【Designed for apples smaller than 10cm】The apple corer slicer has an extended blade length to cut apples less than 10cm /4in, suitable for different types of apples such as Fuji and Gala. Apple cuts are also suitable for other fruits and vegetables such as pears, tomatoes, onions and so on. Note that it is not suitable for harder fruits and vegetables, such as guava, potatoes.

🍎【Easy to Use】Choose an apple smaller than 10cm/4 in, align the apple slicer 12 slices to the core, focus your strength on your thumb muscles and lean forward to cut the apple easily and quickly. You can get into perfect 12 apple thin slices in 5s. In addition, widened metal handle, non-slip, more comfortable and safe to use.

🍎【Ideal Kitchen Gadgets】You can use apple cutter and corer for heavy duty to prepare healthy apple snacks for your children, and you can also easily make apple snacks in offices and parties. The slicer can perfectly cut fruit slices of suitable size when making pies, and can also make salads, fruit desserts and fruit platters.
